widgets_values: Tao mot video ngan 60 giay ve cuoc song hang ngay cua mot co gai tre o Sai Gon. Video gom 5 canh: sang som thuc day, di lam, an trua, lam viec, va buoi toi ve nha. Phong cach cinematographic, mau sac am ap.
nodes.title: Concept Input

widgets_values:
Viet kich ban video chi tiet bang tieng Viet. Moi canh tren 1 dong, format:
CANH [so]: [Dia diem] | [Nhan vat] | [Hanh dong chi tiet] | [Loi thoai/Voice-over] | [Cam xuc/Mood] | [Thoi luong giay]
Tao kich ban tu concept sau:
nodes.title: LLM: Tao Kich Ban

widgets_values:
Tu kich ban, trich xuat danh sach nhan vat. Moi nhan vat tren 1 dong, format:
[Ten] | [Tuoi] | [Gioi tinh] | [Ngoai hinh chi tiet] | [Trang phuc] | [Tinh cach]
nodes.title: LLM: Tuyen Nhan Vat

widgets_values:
Tu kich ban, tao storyboard chi tiet. Moi canh tren 1 dong, format:
SCENE_[so] | [Dia diem] | [Nhan vat] | [Hanh dong] | [Goc camera] | [Mood] | [Thoi luong]
nodes.title: LLM: Boc Storyboard

widgets_values:
Tu storyboard va nhan vat, tao MO TA ANH cho moi canh (2 anh/canh: START va END).
Format:
SCENE_[so]_START | [Nhan vat, tu the, bieu cam, trang phuc] | [Background] | [Camera]
SCENE_[so]_END | [Tuong tu cuoi canh] | [Background] | [Camera]
nodes.title: LLM: Mo Ta Anh

widgets_values:
Tao IMAGE INDEX. Moi dong 1 anh, format:
IMG_[001] | [ORDER] | [START/END] | [SCENE_NUM] | [Prompt tieng Anh de render, cinematic photo, high quality]
nodes.title: LLM: Image Index

widgets_values: Tao prompt tieng Anh render NHAN VAT tren nen trang: character portrait on white background, [chi tiet], [pose], [emotion], high quality, consistent style
nodes.title: LLM: Char Prompt

widgets_values: blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed, ugly, text, watermark
nodes.title: Negative

widgets_values: Tao prompt tieng Anh render BACKGROUND, khong nguoi: cinematic background, [dia diem], [anh sang], no people, high quality, wide angle
nodes.title: LLM: BG Prompt

widgets_values: person, human, character, face, blurry, low quality, text, watermark
nodes.title: Negative BG

widgets_values: Smooth cinematic camera movement, natural human motion, gentle transitions between poses, consistent lighting
blurry, static, low quality, distorted, jerky motion, flickering

nodes.title: LLM: Extract Voiceover
widgets_values:
Tu kich ban video, trich xuat voiceover cua tat ca cac canh.

Yeu cau:
- Ghep thanh mot doan van LIEN MACH, doc tu nhien nhu narrator
- Giu nguyen ngon ngu goc
- Them ngat nghi tu nhien giua cac canh (dung dau ... hoac dau ,)
- CHI TRA VE VAN BAN THUAN TUY, khong format, khong danh so

groups.title: BUOC 3: MO TA ANH START & END
